race.comment: SNAPSHOT (4) tasted defeat for the first time when resuming at Cranbourne then was well backed but disappointed over 1000m at Corowa last start. Freshened up and has won a subsequent Wangaratta jump-out. Has the talent to win a race like this. ZOUROSA (10) led but found the winner far too good when fresh from a spell over 1000m at Mornington last time out. Can jump to the lead and dictate from gate one. Sure to offer a bit more at the end of this one. JUSTENUFFSPLASH (9) has been kept on ice since resuming with a close second over a shorter trip at Albury a month ago. Wide gate is the biggest concern. BEFORE THE WAR (2) won his third 1100m race from six attempts at Kerang recently. Genuine sprinter with each-way claims. REASONABLE POINT (3) won a similar race here in January and has been thereabouts in three runs since. Worth including.
